meta.title: Lynce — Smart things for smart cities
meta.description: Lynce connects every technology, every company and every data source in the city into one intelligent ecosystem.

section1.headlineLine2: They need technologies that work together.
section1.body: Today hundreds of companies build intelligent technology for cities: traffic, waste, lighting, energy, water, mobility, environmental monitoring. Each one solves its own piece. But every platform lives in isolation, speaking its own language, blind to all the others. The result isn't a smart city. It's a collection of smart systems that never talk to each other.

ecosystem.title: Everything connects through Lynce
ecosystem.subtitle: An interoperability layer where every technology, every company and every data source finds its place.

platform.title: From isolated systems to unified intelligence
platform.stepDisconnectedNote: Every vendor, every protocol, every dashboard apart.
platform.stepLynceNote: A common layer that translates, syncs and connects.
platform.stepUnifiedNote: One single view. One city thinking as a whole.

ownSolutions.title: Lynce also builds
ownSolutions.body: While we connect the ecosystem, we develop our own Smart City solutions: the first step to prove what's possible when technology works together.
ownSolutions.note: The end goal stays the same: to be the layer that connects everyone else.

ai.name: Artificial Intelligence
ai.description: Models that find patterns across systems that never used to intersect.

iot.name: IoT
iot.description: Thousands of sensors, one shared real-time data language.

blockchain.name: Blockchain
blockchain.description: Traceability and trust between organizations that don't know each other.

satellites.name: Satellites
satellites.description: Territory-scale vision, integrated with what's happening on the ground.

cloud.name: Cloud
cloud.description: Elastic infrastructure that scales with every new city connected.

edge.name: Edge Computing
edge.description: Millisecond decisions, made where they actually matter: at the edge.

vision.statement: The future of smart cities doesn't depend on more technology. It depends on technology stepping away from competition and into collaboration.
vision.subtext: Lynce exists to be that collaboration.
